title: 🗜 Myth Compression Nodes
name: Myth Compression Nodes
what_it_is: Dense symbolic points where entire narratives or archetypes are compressed into a single glyph or structure—overloaded with meaning.
how_to_use: he stares at the node—whole worlds locked in one sigil
her breath stutters near it—the myth density crushes language
animation_behavior: Myth pulses out from node in bursts, form shifts under symbolic pressure, environment warps around glyph ---
